full_text:
Kong Zhou (Jijiang) 孔宙
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Kong Zhou (孔宙), styledJijiang, was born in Lu. Father of Kong Rong and Kong Bao. Steele was set up on his death. Kong Zhou was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Kong Zhou lived during the Later Han Dynasty periods of Chinese history.
